requirement_topic.en: National Conformity Marking / Type Approval — NSC / DSN and DES (No Confirmed EV-Charger Scheme as of 2026-06)
requirement_topic.zh: 国家合格标志/型式认可——NSC / DSN与DES（截至2026年6月无已确认电动汽车充电桩方案）
requirement_topic.zht: 國家合格標誌/型式認可——NSC / DSN與DES（截至2026年6月無已確認電動汽車充電樁方案）

summary.en: The Department of Standards Brunei (DSN, Jabatan Standard Brunei, referred to as NSC in some contexts) under the Ministry of Finance and Economy is Brunei's national standards body and an ISO member. DSN develops and publishes Brunei National Standards (BNS) and participates in ASEAN standardisation activities. The Department of Electrical Services (DES) administers electrical installation approval and type acceptance for electrical equipment in Brunei. No confirmed dedicated EV-charger-specific mandatory conformity marking or national product certification scheme under DSN/NSC has been identified as of 2026-06-14. Electrical equipment imports to Brunei require DES coordination; exporters should verify whether any EV-charger-specific conformity scheme has been introduced after 2026-06 by checking with DSN and DES directly.
summary.zh: 文莱标准局（DSN，即Jabatan Standard Brunei，在某些情况下亦称NSC，隶属财政和经济部）是文莱国家标准机构，也是ISO成员。DSN制定并发布文莱国家标准（BNS），并参与东盟标准化活动。电气服务部（DES）负责文莱电气设备的电气安装审批和型式验收。截至2026年6月14日，未发现DSN/NSC针对电动汽车充电桩的专项强制合格标志或国家产品认证方案。进口至文莱的电气设备须经DES协调；出口商应直接向DSN和DES核实2026年6月后是否已出台任何电动汽车充电桩专项合格评定方案。
summary.zht: 汶萊標準局（DSN，即Jabatan Standard Brunei，在某些情況下亦稱NSC，隸屬財政和經濟部）是汶萊國家標準機構，也是ISO成員。DSN制定並發布汶萊國家標準（BNS），並參與東盟標準化活動。電氣服務部（DES）負責汶萊電氣設備的電氣安裝審批和型式驗收。截至2026年6月14日，未發現DSN/NSC針對電動汽車充電樁的專項強制合格標誌或國家產品認證方案。進口至汶萊的電氣設備須經DES協調；出口商應直接向DSN和DES核實2026年6月後是否已出台任何電動汽車充電樁專項合格評定方案。

standards_or_laws: Department of Standards Brunei (DSN / NSC) — national standards body under Ministry of Finance and Economy
Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development — electrical equipment type approval and installation authority
Brunei Electricity Order (Cap. 165) — statutory framework for electrical installation approval
ASEAN AEMTS (ASEAN EV MRA Technical Specifications) — under development; not yet binding as of 2026-06

summary.en: China EV chargers are subject to China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) where the product falls within the CCC scope, backed by GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 test evidence. CCC certification and China GB/T test reports are not recognised by DES or DSN/NSC as a Brunei conformity substitute. Exporters must obtain Brunei-specific DES and, if applicable, DSN/NSC acceptance rather than relying on CCC alone.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩在适用范围内须通过中国强制认证（CCC/3C），依据GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234测试证据。CCC认证和中国GB/T测试报告不被DES或DSN/NSC认可为文莱合格评定替代凭证。出口商须取得文莱DES及（如适用）DSN/NSC专项验收文件，不能仅依赖CCC。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁在適用範圍內須通過中國強制認證（CCC/3C），依據GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234測試證據。CCC認證和中國GB/T測試報告不被DES或DSN/NSC認可為汶萊合格評定替代憑證。出口商須取得汶萊DES及（如適用）DSN/NSC專項驗收文件，不能僅依賴CCC。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) — China Compulsory Certification for EV chargers (not recognised in Brunei)

gap.en: Exporters must: (1) confirm with DSN (www.dsn.gov.bn) and DES whether any EV-charger-specific conformity scheme has been introduced — no scheme was confirmed as of 2026-06-14; (2) prepare IEC-family safety, EMC, and connector test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories as the technical evidence base for DES type acceptance; (3) engage a Brunei licensed electrical contractor for DES installation coordination; (4) not assume CCC or GB/T reports alone fulfil Brunei type acceptance; (5) track ASEAN AEMTS framework development — if AEMTS becomes binding, it may introduce new conformity assessment requirements for ASEAN EV charging infrastructure.
gap.zh: 出口商须：(1) 向DSN（www.dsn.gov.bn）和DES确认是否已出台电动汽车充电桩专项合格评定方案——截至2026年6月14日，未发现此类方案；(2) 准备ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC体系安全、EMC和接口测试报告，作为DES型式验收的技术证据基础；(3) 委托文莱持牌电气承包商进行DES安装协调；(4) 不得假设仅凭CCC或GB/T报告即可满足文莱型式验收要求；(5) 跟踪东盟AEMTS框架进展——若AEMTS生效具有约束力，可能对东盟电动汽车充电基础设施引入新的合格评定要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須：(1) 向DSN（www.dsn.gov.bn）和DES確認是否已出台電動汽車充電樁專項合格評定方案——截至2026年6月14日，未發現此類方案；(2) 準備ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC體系安全、EMC和接口測試報告，作為DES型式驗收的技術證據基礎；(3) 委託汶萊持牌電氣承包商進行DES安裝協調；(4) 不得假設僅憑CCC或GB/T報告即可滿足汶萊型式驗收要求；(5) 跟蹤東盟AEMTS框架進展——若AEMTS生效具有約束力，可能對東盟電動汽車充電基礎設施引入新的合格評定要求。

mandatory_status.target: DES type acceptance and installation approval are mandatory for electrical equipment in Brunei; no confirmed dedicated EV-charger conformity marking scheme under DSN/NSC published as of 2026-06-14; AEMTS is not yet binding
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC is mandatory for applicable EV charger products in China; not recognised in Brunei as a conformity substitute

source.publisher: Department of Standards Brunei (DSN), Ministry of Finance and Economy, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed EV-charger-specific mandatory conformity marking scheme under DSN/NSC was found as of 2026-06-14. DES type acceptance and installation approval via a licensed electrical contractor are the applicable conformity pathway. IEC-family test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories are the appropriate technical evidence base. Confirm current DSN/DES requirements directly before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年6月14日，未发现DSN/NSC针对电动汽车充电桩的专项强制合格标志方案。DES通过持牌电气承包商的型式验收和安装审批是适用的合格评定路径。ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC体系测试报告是适当的技术证据基础。进口前应直接向DSN/DES确认现行要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年6月14日，未發現DSN/NSC針對電動汽車充電樁的專項強制合格標誌方案。DES通過持牌電氣承包商的型式驗收和安裝審批是適用的合格評定路徑。ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC體系測試報告是適當的技術證據基礎。進口前應直接向DSN/DES確認現行要求。

requirement_topic.en: EV Market Maturity — Brunei Nascent Adoption vs China Mass-Market Ecosystem
requirement_topic.zh: 电动汽车市场成熟度——文莱新兴市场与中国成熟生态
requirement_topic.zht: 電動汽車市場成熟度——汶萊新興市場與中國成熟生態

summary.en: Brunei has a nascent EV market. EV adoption in Brunei is government-encouraged as part of energy diversification policy under the Energy Department of the Prime Minister's Office (also referenced as Ministry of Energy in some sources — note should be confirmed with official sources at time of entry). Fuel has historically been heavily subsidised in Brunei, which has slowed consumer EV uptake relative to markets with higher fuel costs. As of 2026-06, public EV charging infrastructure in Bandar Seri Begawan is limited, with only a small number of publicly accessible charging points. Brunei's right-hand drive market and ASEAN context position it naturally toward the IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector ecosystem. The small market size means project-by-project customisation and installer relationships are critical for successful entry.
summary.zh: 文莱是电动汽车新兴市场。文莱电动汽车普及受政府鼓励，是总理府能源局（部分资料称之为能源部——进入市场时应向官方来源确认）能源多元化政策的一部分。文莱历史上油价补贴力度较大，相比燃油成本较高的市场，消费者对电动汽车的接受速度较慢。截至2026年6月，斯里巴加湾市的公共电动汽车充电基础设施十分有限，公众可使用的充电点数量很少。文莱右舵市场和东盟背景使其自然倾向于IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口体系。较小的市场规模意味着逐项目定制和安装商关系对成功进入市场至关重要。
summary.zht: 汶萊是電動汽車新興市場。汶萊電動汽車普及受政府鼓勵，是總理府能源局（部分資料稱之為能源部——進入市場時應向官方來源確認）能源多元化政策的一部分。汶萊歷史上油價補貼力度較大，相比燃油成本較高的市場，消費者對電動汽車的接受速度較慢。截至2026年6月，斯里巴加湾市的公共電動汽車充電基礎設施十分有限，公眾可使用的充電點數量很少。汶萊右舵市場和東盟背景使其自然傾向於IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口體系。較小的市場規模意味著逐項目定制和安裝商關係對成功進入市場至關重要。

standards_or_laws: Energy Department, Prime Minister's Office, Brunei — energy diversification policy and EV adoption context
Brunei National Development Plan — economic diversification and green energy targets
ASEAN EV cooperation framework (ongoing — not yet binding as of 2026-06)

summary.en: China has a mature mass-market EV ecosystem with the largest public charging network in the world, extensive GB/T-standard charging infrastructure, established domestic manufacturers, and deep supply-chain integration. China's domestic EV policy, network density, and technical standards are not transferable to Brunei: Brunei requires IEC-standard connectors, IEC-aligned safety evidence, and DES installation approval regardless of China domestic market volumes or policy support.
summary.zh: 中国拥有成熟的大众市场电动汽车生态系统，拥有全球最大的公共充电网络、完善的GB/T标准充电基础设施、成熟的国内制造商和深度的供应链整合。中国国内电动汽车政策、网络密度和技术标准不能直接移植到文莱：无论中国国内市场规模或政策支持如何，文莱均要求IEC标准接口、IEC体系安全证据和DES安装审批。
summary.zht: 中國擁有成熟的大眾市場電動汽車生態系統，擁有全球最大的公共充電網絡、完善的GB/T標準充電基礎設施、成熟的國內製造商和深度的供應鏈整合。中國國內電動汽車政策、網絡密度和技術標準不能直接移植到汶萊：無論中國國內市場規模或政策支持如何，汶萊均要求IEC標準接口、IEC體系安全證據和DES安裝審批。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Brunei's nascent EV market means: (1) early movers have the opportunity to establish IEC-standard infrastructure relationships with DES and potential operators before the market scales; (2) the small number of early deployments means product customisation per project is more cost-efficient than a mass-market approach; (3) Chinese exporters should not assume that China domestic volumes or technical capabilities are directly visible to or valued by Brunei project stakeholders without a locally referenced track record; (4) DES familiarity with Chinese EV charger brands may be limited — providing clear IEC-family documentation is critical for DES acceptance.
gap.zh: 文莱新兴电动汽车市场意味着：(1) 先行者有机会在市场规模扩大前与DES及潜在运营商建立IEC标准基础设施合作关系；(2) 早期部署数量少，逐项目产品定制比大众市场方式更具成本效益；(3) 中国出口商不应假设中国国内销量或技术能力在没有本地参考业绩的情况下能被文莱项目利益方认可；(4) DES对中国电动汽车充电桩品牌的了解可能有限——提供清晰的IEC体系文件对DES验收至关重要。
gap.zht: 汶萊新興電動汽車市場意味著：(1) 先行者有機會在市場規模擴大前與DES及潛在運營商建立IEC標準基礎設施合作關係；(2) 早期部署數量少，逐項目產品定制比大眾市場方式更具成本效益；(3) 中國出口商不應假設中國國內銷量或技術能力在沒有本地參考業績的情況下能被汶萊項目利益方認可；(4) DES對中國電動汽車充電樁品牌的了解可能有限——提供清晰的IEC體系文件對DES驗收至關重要。

mandatory_status.target: Policy context — Brunei government encourages EV adoption; not itself a mandatory product standard; DES and DSN/NSC technical requirements remain in force independently
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China domestic EV market maturity does not affect Brunei conformity obligations

source.publisher: Energy Department, Prime Minister's Office, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brunei's EV market is nascent but government-encouraged. Early IEC-standard charger deployments can position exporters ahead of market growth. China domestic market scale is not a Brunei conformity shortcut — IEC connector redesign, IEC safety evidence, and DES coordination are all required regardless of China domestic volumes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 文莱电动汽车市场处于起步阶段，但受政府鼓励。早期IEC标准充电桩部署可使出口商在市场增长前建立先发优势。中国国内市场规模不是文莱合规捷径——IEC接口重新设计、IEC安全证据和DES协调均为必要条件，与中国国内销量无关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 汶萊電動汽車市場處於起步階段，但受政府鼓勵。早期IEC標準充電樁部署可使出口商在市場增長前建立先發優勢。中國國內市場規模不是汶萊合規捷徑——IEC接口重新設計、IEC安全證據和DES協調均為必要條件，與中國國內銷量無關。

requirement_topic.en: Import / Customs — Brunei Customs and Excise, ASEAN ATIGA, DES Clearance
requirement_topic.zh: 进口/海关——文莱关税与消费税局、东盟ATIGA、DES清关
requirement_topic.zht: 進口/海關——汶萊關稅與消費稅局、東盟ATIGA、DES清關

summary.en: Electrical equipment including EV chargers imported into Brunei is handled by the Royal Customs and Excise Department (RCED) under the Ministry of Finance and Economy. Brunei is a member of ASEAN and participates in the ASEAN Trade in Goods Agreement (ATIGA), under which tariffs on goods originating from ASEAN member states may be reduced or eliminated for qualifying products. However, China is not an ASEAN member; China-origin EV chargers would be subject to standard Brunei import duties rather than ATIGA preferential rates unless covered by the ASEAN–China Free Trade Agreement (ACFTA) provisions. All electrical equipment imports also require DES clearance and approval for installation use. Exporters must confirm the applicable HS code, duty rate, ACFTA eligibility, and DES clearance requirements with the Brunei importer before shipment.
summary.zh: 进口至文莱的电气设备（包括电动汽车充电桩）由财政和经济部皇家关税与消费税局（RCED）管理。文莱是东盟成员，参与《东盟货物贸易协议》（ATIGA），依据该协议，符合条件的东盟成员国原产商品可享受降低或免除的关税。但中国不是东盟成员；中国原产电动汽车充电桩须缴纳文莱标准进口关税，除非适用《东盟-中国自由贸易协议》（ACFTA）条款。所有电气设备进口还须取得DES清关和安装审批。出口商须在发货前与文莱进口商确认适用HS编码、税率、ACFTA资格和DES清关要求。
summary.zht: 進口至汶萊的電氣設備（包括電動汽車充電樁）由財政和經濟部皇家關稅與消費稅局（RCED）管理。汶萊是東盟成員，參與《東盟貨物貿易協議》（ATIGA），依據該協議，符合條件的東盟成員國原產商品可享受降低或免除的關稅。但中國不是東盟成員；中國原產電動汽車充電樁須繳納汶萊標準進口關稅，除非適用《東盟-中國自由貿易協議》（ACFTA）條款。所有電氣設備進口還須取得DES清關和安裝審批。出口商須在發貨前與汶萊進口商確認適用HS編碼、稅率、ACFTA資格和DES清關要求。

standards_or_laws: Royal Customs and Excise Department (RCED), Ministry of Finance and Economy, Brunei — import duties and customs clearance authority
ASEAN Trade in Goods Agreement (ATIGA) — preferential tariffs for ASEAN-origin goods (China is not ASEAN)
ASEAN–China Free Trade Agreement (ACFTA) — may provide preferential tariff treatment for qualifying China-origin goods imported into Brunei; confirm HS code coverage
Department of Electrical Services (DES) — electrical equipment clearance and installation approval required separately from customs clearance

summary.en: For China-origin EV chargers exported to Brunei, no specific China-side import restriction applies for domestic use. The applicable trade framework for Brunei import is ACFTA (not ATIGA, since China is not ASEAN). Exporters should confirm the specific HS code for the charger type (AC wall box, DC fast charger, cable assembly, etc.) and verify the ACFTA tariff schedule and rules of origin requirements before assuming preferential duty treatment. DES clearance is a separate requirement from customs clearance and must be addressed in parallel.
summary.zh: 对于出口至文莱的中国原产电动汽车充电桩，中方无针对国内使用的特定进口限制。适用于文莱进口的贸易框架为ACFTA（而非ATIGA，因为中国不是东盟成员）。出口商在假设享受优惠关税待遇前，应确认充电桩类型（交流挂壁式、直流快充、电缆组件等）的具体HS编码，并核实ACFTA关税税率表和原产地规则要求。DES清关是独立于海关清关的另一项要求，须同步处理。
summary.zht: 對於出口至汶萊的中國原產電動汽車充電樁，中方無針對國內使用的特定進口限制。適用於汶萊進口的貿易框架為ACFTA（而非ATIGA，因為中國不是東盟成員）。出口商在假設享受優惠關稅待遇前，應確認充電樁類型（交流掛壁式、直流快充、電纜組件等）的具體HS編碼，並核實ACFTA關稅稅率表和原產地規則要求。DES清關是獨立於海關清關的另一項要求，須同步處理。

standards_or_laws: ASEAN–China Free Trade Agreement (ACFTA) — applicable trade framework for China-origin goods imported into Brunei
China Customs Export Regulations — standard export documentation requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm with the Brunei importer: (1) applicable HS code for the specific EV charger product (AC wall box, DC fast charger, cable, accessories); (2) import duty rate applicable to China-origin goods under ACFTA — do not assume zero duty without HS code and ACFTA schedule confirmation; (3) DES clearance requirements for the specific equipment type — DES approval for installation is separate from and in addition to customs clearance; (4) labelling requirements (English language required; confirm with importer whether Malay language labelling is required); (5) documentation required by RCED for customs clearance (commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin for ACFTA if preferential rate claimed).
gap.zh: 出口商须与文莱进口商确认：(1) 具体电动汽车充电桩产品（交流挂壁式、直流快充、电缆、附件）的适用HS编码；(2) ACFTA下中国原产商品适用的进口关税率——未经HS编码和ACFTA税率表确认，不得假设零关税；(3) 具体设备类型的DES清关要求——DES安装审批独立于且额外于海关清关；(4) 标签要求（须有英文；向进口商确认是否须有马来语标签）；(5) RCED海关清关所需文件（商业发票、装箱单、提单、如申请ACFTA优惠税率须提供原产地证书）。
gap.zht: 出口商須與汶萊進口商確認：(1) 具體電動汽車充電樁產品（交流掛壁式、直流快充、電纜、附件）的適用HS編碼；(2) ACFTA下中國原產商品適用的進口關稅率——未經HS編碼和ACFTA稅率表確認，不得假設零關稅；(3) 具體設備類型的DES清關要求——DES安裝審批獨立於且額外於海關清關；(4) 標籤要求（須有英文；向進口商確認是否須有馬來語標籤）；(5) RCED海關清關所需文件（商業發票、裝箱單、提單、如申請ACFTA優惠稅率須提供原產地證書）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — customs clearance via RCED is required for all imports; DES clearance and installation approval required separately for electrical equipment; ACFTA preferential tariff eligibility depends on HS code and rules of origin — confirm with importer
mandatory_status.cn: Standard China export documentation applies; no specific restriction for EV charger exports to Brunei under China export regulations as of 2026-06

source.publisher: Royal Customs and Excise Department (RCED), Ministry of Finance and Economy, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brunei customs clearance via RCED and DES installation clearance are both required for EV charger imports and are separate processes. China-origin EV chargers may benefit from ACFTA preferential tariff treatment — confirm the HS code, ACFTA coverage, and rules of origin before claiming preferential rates. Do not assume ATIGA applies to China-origin goods. Engage a Brunei-licensed electrical contractor and importer early to plan both customs and DES clearance timelines.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 文莱RCED海关清关和DES安装清关均为电动汽车充电桩进口的必要程序，且为独立流程。中国原产电动汽车充电桩可能受益于ACFTA优惠关税待遇——在申请优惠税率前须确认HS编码、ACFTA覆盖范围和原产地规则。不得假设ATIGA适用于中国原产商品。应尽早联系文莱持牌电气承包商和进口商，统筹规划海关和DES清关时间线。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 汶萊RCED海關清關和DES安裝清關均為電動汽車充電樁進口的必要程序，且為獨立流程。中國原產電動汽車充電樁可能受益於ACFTA優惠關稅待遇——在申請優惠稅率前須確認HS編碼、ACFTA覆蓋範圍和原產地規則。不得假設ATIGA適用於中國原產商品。應盡早聯繫汶萊持牌電氣承包商和進口商，統籌規劃海關和DES清關時間線。
